channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: MSI's Claw 8 EX AI+ handheld comes out on June 23
item.description: The premium gaming handheld's price is expected to be around $1,500.

item.title: Here’s your first look at ‘A Minecraft Movie Squared’ with Kirsten Dunst as Alex
item.description: The A Minecraft Movie sequel officially has a title: A Minecraft Movie Squared. What's more, we now know that Kirsten Dunst will star as Alex, the game's female character option, and that Matt Berry is set to play an even bigger role in this film. He voiced Nitwit in the first movie, but in this […]

item.title: Twitch creators will soon be able to stream in horizontal and vertical formats simultaneously
item.description: The company announced the new Dual Format feature alongside other updates at TwitchCon Europe.
